title: Minecraft Realism Reimagined
description: This is a realism-based modpack adding more than any other modpack would add!
body:
This modpack adds better graphics distant horizons better terain and more! 

press f6 to change camera.

To make the graphics better equip a shaders form the modpack and equip the texture pack if
you want.





This is a realism modpack it has distant horizoins, phisics shaders, first person view model and alot more! All versoins of the modpack under 3.0.0 have a time mod that makes the time in real life to minecraft
and you cant skip the night so if you dont want that download versoin 3.0.0 or higher.






Turn down graphics setting for better preformance.








![This icon is not how the modpack makes the game look Its just pixel art](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f24d3dc5a2e59b503336ba0627b6d1af8c73a940.png)
